name: Long Straddle (Event / High IV)
description: Buy ATM call and put before high-impact events when a large move is expected and IV may expand or realize volatility exceeds implied.
hypothesis: Binary events (RBI, budget, election results) create outsized moves; long gamma benefits from expansion beyond breakevens.

conditions: IV not already at extreme percentile (>90)
Buy ATM or near-ATM straddle on nearest weekly expiry
entry_rules.position_sizing: Debit = total premium; risk 0.5-1% per event trade

exit_rules.target: 100-200% of premium on large gap move
exit_rules.time_exit: Exit immediately after event catalyst resolves

market_conditions.volatility_regime: Rising IV into event; avoid post-crush entry
market_conditions.trend: Direction agnostic; needs magnitude not direction

notes: IV crush after event often hurts; exit on open post-event unless gap favors position. Not suitable for low-vol grind weeks.
